description: Composition Black kurta with multi-coloured print, made of 100% cotton, has a round slit neck with multi-coloured piping and sequin detailing, short sleeves in mix-and-match print with multi-coloured piping at the hem, and has a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron Designed to celebrate womanhood in all its facets, this kurta from biba is inspired by traditional Indian print and dye arts that make it a special wardrobe favourite. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the multi-coloured print adds zing to the garment. Team it with toned down leggings or pyjamas, sleek accessories and heeled slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
